headline: bottle-protocol, tile-refiner, and fleet-homunculus join the manifest.
body: bottle-protocol is async I2I with relay discovery and trust-weighted routing. tile-refiner is the extraction furnace: tiles in, artifacts out, yield improving every run. fleet-homunculus is the deployable zeroclaw skeleton with hooks for instincts, rooms, and deadband.
fleet_relevance: Spawn a new zeroclaw in three lines of Python. It talks to the fleet before it's fully rigged.
actionable: Spawn a test homunculus and point it at a room
Watch it pull tiles through bottle-protocol and refine them
